source_description: Post-merge audit follow-ups from agent-executor-01KRWPK7 mission. Four issues from WP review cycles: #1509 (WP03 — provider exception hierarchy for retry semantics), #1510 (WP08 — dispatch domain events for ai-observability listener), #1511 (WP05 — collapse BroadcastStorageAdapter, reconcile pending_approval OpenAPI shape), #1513 (WP06 — AiRunCommand --watch attaches real SSE consumer, not informational stub). Land before the v1 contract crystallizes.
